item.title: A closer look at a cobra with Chandler's Wild Life
item.description: Take a closer look at king cobras, exploring their habitat, behavior, and key facts through a guided tour experience.

item.title: Wild Thorny Devil in Australia
item.description: A closer look at the thorny devil in its natural Australian habitat, exploring its unique features, behavior, and survival adaptations.

item.title: Feeding King Cobras with Chandler's Wild Life
item.description: A look at the feeding behavior of king cobras, highlighting their natural instincts, diet, and handling by experienced caretakers.

item.title: Rare venomous snake collection highlights
item.description: Explore a collection of rare venomous snakes, highlighting unique species, traits, and their role in the natural world.
